description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. The workflow should have two jobs, build_gcc and build_clang_san, both running on ubuntu-22.04. The build_gcc job checks out the repository with submodules, installs g++-12, and runs .travis-script.sh with gcc-12 and g++-12. The build_clang_san job checks out the repository with submodules, installs clang-16 and g++-12, and runs .travis-script.sh with clang-16.
